headline: Here's Why You Should Add DaVita Stock to Your Portfolio for Now
summary: DVA is gaining attention after strong Q4 results and steady global expansion, though its heavy reliance on commercial insurers remains a concern.

headline: Why Cardinal Health May Be a Best Buy for the Coming Stagflation
summary: This morning’s jobs report landed hard. Nonfarm payrolls plunged by 92,000 jobs, shattering expectations of a 55,000 gain. Unemployment climbed to 4.4%, while average hourly earnings jumped 0.4% month-over-month — well above the 0.3% consensus. The Federal Reserve is now caught in a classic stagflation trap: slashing rates risks reigniting inflation, yet raising them is ... Why Cardinal Health May Be a Best Buy for the Coming Stagflation

headline: BDX Secures CE Mark for Revello Stent to Treat Iliac Artery Disease
summary: BD wins CE Mark for its Revello vascular covered stent for iliac artery disease, expanding its peripheral vascular portfolio in the growing PAD treatment market.
